title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 03 2022

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 03 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends , They rose as much as 9.58%. the main contract closed 797.5, an increase of 6.83%throughout the day. the quotation in the morning was increased by 30-50 yuan/mt over yesterday.
